rationale: No qualitative new developments directly affecting Poland; Iran deal progress continues as background, war in Ukraine unchanged.

top_events.title: Iran deal close; Hormuz reopening tied to agreement
top_events.summary: Iran reaffirms Hormuz would reopen if a deal is signed; US and Iran say agreement is close. Continued momentum could ease energy prices for Poland indirectly.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: A US airstrike killed the leader of a Venezuelan gang; minimal direct relevance to Poland but signals US unilateral military action abroad.

top_events.title: Lebanon fighting continues despite Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Israel continues strikes on south Lebanon even as US-Iran negotiations proceed, keeping Middle East instability elevated with indirect energy price implications for Poland.
